narrative:
Madison (precinct in Fayette County) has 723 registered voters, with 53.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 38.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 30.3 percentage points.
